description: Cutting-edge black hole physics - recent observations, quantum information approaches.

facts.context: The Event Horizon Telescope image of M87* showed:
facts.truth: ring of light confirming black hole predictions
distractors: that general relativity predictions were fundamentally incorrect at horizon scales
complete absence of any observable features or emission near the central object
strong observational evidence against the existence of black hole event horizons
revealed significant deviations from general relativistic predictions requiring new physics
showed that black hole mergers do not produce gravitational wave signals as expected
demonstrated that Einstein's theory fails in the strong gravity regime entirely

facts.context: The island formula in black hole entropy:
facts.truth: adds contributions from disconnected spacetime regions
distractors: proves that quantum corrections to entropy are completely negligible in all cases
has been ruled out by recent gravitational wave and imaging observations directly
applies only to classical entropy calculations without any quantum mechanical input

facts.context: Soft hair on black holes involves:
distractors: purely classical geometric deformations of the event horizon surface structure
violations of the no-hair theorem that have been experimentally disproven now
physical matter configurations outside the horizon similar to stellar atmospheres

facts.context: The complexity equals volume (CV) conjecture states:
facts.truth: computational complexity grows with volume behind horizon
distractors: complexity scales with boundary surface area identical to entropy holographic bound
there is no meaningful relationship between complexity and any geometric quantity
complexity decreases as black holes evolve toward thermal equilibrium states

facts.truth: entropy rising then falling during evaporation
distractors: monotonically increasing entropy throughout the entire black hole lifetime
constant entropy throughout evaporation with no information release whatsoever
entropy that remains undefined due to fundamental information loss paradox

facts.context: Replica wormholes in gravitational path integral:
facts.truth: enable Page curve derivation from gravity
distractors: have been proven to be unphysical mathematical artifacts with no real consequences
contradict all established results in semiclassical gravity and quantum field theory
only appear in supersymmetric theories and have no relevance to real black holes

facts.context: EHT observations of Sgr A* (Milky Way center):
facts.truth: confirmed 4 million solar mass black hole
distractors: showed no evidence for a black hole at the galactic center contrary to expectations
revealed a naked singularity without an event horizon present in observations
demonstrated that stellar orbits are explained without requiring any central mass

facts.context: The photon ring in black hole images:
facts.truth: encodes spacetime geometry through light orbit
distractors: is a purely artistic artifact introduced during image processing reconstruction
provides no useful information about the underlying spacetime structure geometry
can be explained entirely by accretion disk emission without gravitational lensing

facts.context: Black holes are fast scramblers meaning:
facts.truth: information spreads across horizon in log time
distractors: information remains localized at the point of entry indefinitely until evaporation
scrambling time scales linearly with black hole mass requiring astronomical timescales
information is immediately destroyed upon crossing the horizon without any spreading

facts.context: LIGO/Virgo black hole merger observations found:
facts.truth: unexpected population in pair-instability mass gap
distractors: all mergers perfectly match simple stellar evolution mass distribution predictions
no black holes exist above ten solar masses contradicting theoretical expectations
primordial black holes dominate the observed merger population overwhelmingly
classical general relativity with no modifications at the quantum scale needed
nothing scientifically meaningful about black hole physics or structure at all
only Newtonian gravity effects that are already well understood classically
